svg.text: ARP request / reply on the wire

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the exact byte format of an ARP request?')
sendPrompt('Why is the ARP reply unicast instead of broadcast?')
g.text: dst MAC: sender's MAC "192.168.1.1 is at aa:bb:cc:dd:ee:ff"

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How long does an ARP cache entry live?')
sendPrompt('What happens to the queued packet after ARP resolves?')

g.text: Future send() calls — cache hit, no ARP needed
entry expires after ~20 min (OS-dependent), then ARP fires again
